The '''Jahibakti''' kajidic was a [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]] located on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], which shared the arms dealing business with [[Gardulla Besadii the Elder/Legends|Gardulla]] and controlled nearly fifty percent of the planet's water supply. Like four other Hutt kajidics, the Jahibakti controlled nearly one fifth of Tatooine's criminal activities before [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba's]] rise to power.
